meaning: n.儒家学者adj.孔子的,儒家的
examples: The government played a major role in promoting Confucian philosophy.
The virtues of the self are often overlooked in Confucian morals.
The use of deferential language is symbolic of the Confucian ideal of the woman, which dominates conservative gender norms in Japan.
Song was known as a person with the Confucian virtues of loyalty and righteousness.
It looks like Chinese reformers will have to continue to practice the Confucian virtue of patience.
